summary: Full backend + frontend validation of Island Stampede landing page. All 10 backend pytest tests passed (root, lead create for ticket/sponsor, invalid type -> 400, missing name -> 422, invalid email -> 422, list, filter by type ticket & sponsor, stats). All critical frontend flows verified via Playwright on mobile viewport (390x844): countdown ticks (45s -> 43s), hero BUY TICKETS opens ticket sheet, form validation error appears on empty submit, ticket lead POST succeeds and shows success state, sticky SPONSOR opens sponsor sheet with Company field, sponsor lead POST succeeds, FAQ accordion expands and collapses, sticky BUY TICKETS opens ticket sheet. Stats endpoint reflects persisted leads (ticket_leads=3, sponsor_leads=2 after UI submissions).

minor.issue: Returns 200 on success instead of 201 Created (minor REST convention)

logger is referenced inside create_lead but defined AFTER app.include_router / add_middleware. Works today because logger is used only at request time (after module load), but best-practice is to configure logging before use.

issues: Sheet is quite tall on 390x844; submit button falls just outside initial viewport requiring inner scroll. Works via ScrollView but touch users must scroll to reach REGISTER INTEREST button on smaller devices. Consider reducing vertical padding or making the sheet content more compact.

action_items: (Optional) Move logger.basicConfig / logger definition above the route handlers in backend/server.py
(Optional) Reduce LeadSheet vertical footprint so the submit button is visible without scrolling on 390x844
critical_code_review_comments: server.py properly excludes MongoDB _id via projection {'_id': 0} in list_leads - good
Pydantic EmailStr provides email validation - working
Frontend uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly (per Expo convention)
All interactive elements have testID attributes
logger defined after it is first referenced in code order (still works at runtime, but flag it)
seed_data_creation: 5 TEST_-prefixed leads inserted via UI+API: 3 ticket, 2 sponsor. Safe to purge by filtering emails ending with @example.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL/api. Frontend testIDs: hero-buy-tickets-button, hero-sponsor-button, sticky-buy-tickets-button, sticky-sponsor-button, header-tickets-button, lead-sheet, lead-sheet-title, lead-input-name/email/phone/extra/message, lead-submit-button, lead-error, lead-sheet-success, lead-sheet-done-button, lead-sheet-close, countdown-section, countdown-days/hours/mins/secs, faq-item-{i}, faq-answer-{i}, gallery-section. Note: LeadSheet submit button may be below viewport fold on 390x844 - use JS click or scroll within the sheet ScrollView to reach it.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs blocking functionality. All feature acceptance criteria in the review request are met.
